Video.summary: Selina recently met Lee at the mall and while their love has blossomed, she's got a serious secret - she's really a man! Then D's visits to the local pool have gotten him into hot water after sleeping with the lifeguard.
Video.title: Transsexual Takedown

Video.summary: Three years ago, Manny was accused of sexually molesting Elizabeth’s daughter. While he declares his innocence, Elizabeth has strong doubts and her husband Rodney is caught in the middle. Is he innocent?
Video.title: A Mother’s Rage

Video.summary: A couple, unable to have children, found a 16-year-old to act as a surrogate unitl she took off 5 months in.
Video.title: Our 16 Year Old Surrogate Stole Our Baby

Image.alt: Our 16 Year Old Surrogate Stole Our Baby
Our 16 Year Old Surrogate Stole Our Baby
Our 16 Year Old Surrogate Stole Our Baby

Video.summary: Brady proposes to his ex-girlfriend, then she learns he cheated with her friend; Dillon feels he has to come clean about an advance he made toward his fiancee's friend.
Video.title: It Was a 1 Night Smash

Video.summary: Kevin is settling down with Ashley, but his baby mama Sandra won’t just take it! Gena lied about her pregnancy to stay married to Rico, but now Rico is the liar! He’s coming clean about cheating with Shamika!
Video.title: A Woman's Wrath

Video.summary: A man wants to leave his wife for one of her friends; a man sleeps with his cousin's girlfriend.
Video.title: A Deer Hunter & An Army Gal

Image.alt: A Deer Hunter & An Army Gal
A Deer Hunter & An Army Gal
A Deer Hunter & An Army Gal

Video.summary: Whitney learns what really happens during her children's father's late-night sessions at the recording studio; new mom Coralena is engaged in a war between her fiance and her friend; Denzel's girlfriends fight over him.
Video.title: Big Booty Mistakes

Video.summary: Joanne wants to have a threesome with her friend and the friend's boyfriend; Ron's girlfriend is insanely jealous for a reason; Jazmen confronts her boyfriend and a woman he has been sexting.
Video.title: Girlfriends Get Rolled

Video.summary: A woman discovers her man has been cheating with various women; a woman suspects her husband is cheating with their roommate.
Video.title: Jerry's Talk Show Host Special

Video.summary: Anthoney wants to be a father to his child, but he wants nothing to do with the one-night-stand mother; Deja had sex with her friend's boyfriend and now wants him for herself; Derrick and Haven have confessions to make.
Video.title: Dodging Divorce

Video.summary: Santa and his elves to answer 7 very special Christmas letters from needy children. Watch these happy faces!
Video.title: Dear Santa…

Video.summary: Monica wants her transsexual friend to come clean to her boyfriend about being a man. Ke-Ke learns a secret.
Video.title: Transsexual Secrets Explode!

Video.summary: Jake slept with his brother’s fiancé. Then, Danny claims he’s leaving his fiancé for an escort named Chelsi.
Video.title: Jaw Dropping Wedding

Video.summary: Tasha wants to prove to her ex boyfriend Martin that he's the father of her 4 year old daughter. Martin's sister says that she thinks the child might belong to her boyfriend Terrence because they had a threesome a year ago. Who's the real father?
Video.title: I Had a Threesome: Who's the Dad?

Image.alt: I Had a Threesome: Who's the Dad?
I Had a Threesome: Who's the Dad?
I Had a Threesome: Who's the Dad?

Video.summary: Anthony believes his ex, Erica and her new boyfriend Jeremy are abusing his son. Next, Lacey is being accused, by her aunt, of physically abusing and neglecting her two young children.
Video.title: Young Mothers Accused of Abuse

Video.summary: At 12, Crystal dated 20 year old Matt and was pregnant at 13. He served 15 months in prison for criminal sexual assault on a minor and is a registered sex offender. Are they a product of inappropriate love or just misunderstood?
Video.title: 22-Year-Old Marries 14-Year-Old Girl

Video.summary: Taquita’s ex is in custody for murdering her child, but her step-sisters think that she was aware of the man’s abusive behavior! Then, Dianne gained custody of Tanya’s toddler son after Tanya’s ex shook him, but she suspects Tanya is the abuser!
Video.title: You Failed to Protect Your Son

Image.alt: You Failed to Protect Your Son
You Failed to Protect Your Son
You Failed to Protect Your Son

Video.summary: When this young man says that he'd kill his own mother if the gang asked him to, Steve decides to hold an intervention. With the help of an ex-gang member, they try to speak some truth into this gangster from suburbia.
Video.title: Steve's Gang Intervention

Video.summary: Antoinette says her boyfriend is crazy because he is constantly accusing her of cheating. She says she cheated in the past, but she hasn't since.
Video.title: Lie Detector Drama

Video.summary: Jessica can't make sense of her on again off again relationship with Wade and it's starting to drive her crazy. Wade however claims he's had nothing to do with Jessica and she's been spreading lies and stalking him for years.
Video.title: I Am Not A Stalker

Video.summary: Evan says his girlfriend's sister made up the story that they had sex; Sarra's much-older husband accuses her of having sex with her own cousin.
Video.title: Your Sister Is Lying: We Never Had Sex!

Image.alt: Your Sister Is Lying: We Never Had Sex!
Your Sister Is Lying: We Never Had Sex!
Your Sister Is Lying: We Never Had Sex!

Video.summary: Gloria thinks her sister's apparent drug-overdose death was not an accident, and that her other sister may be responsible.
Video.title: Did You Party With Our Sister and Leave Her to Die?

Image.alt: Did You Party With Our Sister and Leave Her to Die?
Did You Party With Our Sister and Leave Her to Die?
Did You Party With Our Sister and Leave Her to Die?

Video.summary: Terrified mothers appear on the show with their gang member daughters to hopefully change their ways.
Video.title: Girl Gangbangers

Video.summary: Disrespectful children are scaring their families to death. What happened to these twin boys?
Video.title: Increasingly Criminal

Video.summary: "It's strange to say that 23 years ago I fell in love with a girl and couldn't tell her."
Video.title: High School Sweethearts Surprise Reunions

Video.summary: Did these boyfriends tell their girlfriends "Lose weight or lose me?"
Video.title: Starving for Him

Video.summary: These women want to know why their husbands teased and cheated on them while they were pregnant.
Video.title: Cheating on Pregnancy

Video.summary: Young teens say that they're suicidal because of all the abuse they've suffered at the hands of a bully who won't leave them alone.
Video.title: Tormented Teens Confront Their Bullies

Video.summary: Husbands betray their wives with best friends and babysitters on today’s unbelievable episode of cheaters.
Video.title: Heartbreaking Betrayal

Video.summary: Couples that have a 30+ year age gap are confronted and questioned about their relationship on today’s Sally.
Video.title: Old Love

Video.summary: Watch old lovers reunite after many years in this touching episode.
Video.title: True Love Surprise Reunions

Video.summary: Vengeful ex's learn that two wrongs do not make a right.
Video.title: I Got Revenge and It Backfired

Image.alt: I Got Revenge and It Backfired
I Got Revenge and It Backfired
I Got Revenge and It Backfired
